---
title: "Blog"
# Quarto scans the posts folder and lists them as posts
# https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-listings.html
listing:
  contents: posts        # folder to scan for posts
  type: default          # try: default, table, grid
  sort: "date desc"      # newest first
  categories: true       # show a category filter in the sidebar
  feed: true             # generate an RSS feed
---
